files.pairs_format: PairKey[row_count] where PairKey={uint32_t tag, uint32_t version} sorted by (tag,version) within each adsh slice

storage_extensions.usage: mmap offsets.bin and pairs.bin; for each filtered num row, use num.adsh as a direct-array lookup into the current pre adsh slice, then test (num.tag,num.version) against that adsh's sorted PairKey range instead of hashing the full triple into the partitioned-exact structure

join_order.notes: Use a dense offsets array on adsh_code plus a sorted (tag,version) slice per adsh. The filtered num stream has strong adsh locality, so repeated rows from the same filing reuse a tiny hot pre slice instead of recomputing a full-triple hash probe.

scan.access_pattern: Drive from num_ddate_postings range slices, test USD via a compact membership bitset, keep a thread-local cached pre slice for the current adsh, and materialize num.value only after the anti-join miss survives.

data_structures.dim_filter: bitset(39401761) for num_uom_postings membership; drive from num_ddate_postings range rowids
data_structures.fact_join: pre_built_index(dense adsh offsets + sorted PairKey slices) with thread-local current_adsh slice cache and in-slice exact lookup on (tag,version)

indexes.purpose: enumerate 2023 candidate rowids via postings range scan
apply USD membership before join work
reuse a small exact (tag,version) slice per adsh for anti-join membership

optimization_notes: Root cause: after replacing the 805 MB open-addressed pre hash table, the remaining 81 ms hot phase still spends most work on anti-probing a pre layout organized by full-triple hash even though the filtered stream has strong adsh locality and almost every filtered num row matches pre, so reading num.value and redoing full-triple probe setup per row is wasted work. Strategy category E/A: build a new exact storage extension that groups pre's unique (adsh,tag,version) keys by adsh into a 673 KB dense offsets array plus a 66 MB sorted PairKey payload that fits in LLC, then probe only the current adsh's hot (tag,version) slice and late-materialize value after an anti-miss before rolling up by (tag,version).
